items.caption:
Comment "AGENT" to try out Agent Opus and start creating epic Full Story AI Videos. 

Stop spending hours editing videos to promote your brand. Use this AI instead.

It's called Agent Opus. It turns a voice note or a script into a full video, no editing software required.

You upload your audio, pick a visual style, and it handles the rest. Visuals, captions, motion graphics, background music, all built around what you're actually saying.

Think of it like a personal video editor that listens, then builds. Except it works in minutes, not days.

You can also upload up to 8 products, logos, or characters. Agent Opus then pulls your style into every scene of the video.

So the final video feels like it belongs to you, not some random AI template. Your brand colors, your products, your characters, baked in.

The output is a real 60 to 90 second video. Not a 9 second demo clip like every other AI video tool out there.

That length matters. It's long enough to actually tell a story, but short enough to keep viewers watching to the end.

So you get publish-ready content for any short-form channel or website. Reels, TikToks, Shorts, YouTube ads, website hero videos, all from one upload.

The whole pipeline runs in the background. You start with a voice note in the morning, you have a finished video by lunch.

For solo creators, brand owners, and agency teams running daily content, this saves hours every single week.

#opusclip #agentopus #aivideos #aimotiongraphic
items.transcript: Stop spending hours editing videos to promote your brand and use this AI instead. It's called Agent Opus, and it turns a voice note or a script into a full end-to-end video. You just upload your audio, pick a visual style, and it'll handle all the rest. Visuals, captions, motion graphics, background music, all of that built around what it is that you're saying. You can also upload up to eight products, logos, or characters, and it pulls your style into every scene. So the video feels like it belongs to you and not some random AI template. The output is a real 60 to 90 second video. It's not like a nine second demo. It gives you a publish ready piece of content for short form channels or your website. If you want to try it out for yourselves, just comment agent and I'll send you the links directly.

items.caption:
Comment "VIDEO" to get Vidrush AI that can create Entire Youtube Videos In minutes.

You can now build entire YouTube channels using this one AI tool.

It's called VidRush. It's the world's first AI tool that can turn your simple text prompts into full 1-hour-long documentary videos, entirely on its own.

You just give it a video idea. No script, no footage, no editing knowledge required.

VidRush researches the topic and writes a complete script for you. It pulls from real sources, fact-checks the angles, and structures it like a proper documentary.

Then it scans the entire internet to find real-world footage that matches your story. Stock clips, archival footage, news segments, whatever fits the scene.

And if it can't find the right clip, it automatically generates custom motion graphics to fill the gap. So your video never has those awkward black screens or repeated b-roll.

From there, it adds the voiceover, on-screen text, smooth transitions, and sound effects. Every layer pro editors usually spend hours on.

Think of it like a full production studio compressed into one tool. Writer, researcher, editor, voice actor, and motion designer, all rolled into one.

Finally, it loads everything into an editing timeline. You can adjust any part of the video just by chatting with it.

Change a scene, swap a clip, rewrite a line. All through plain text, no timeline knowledge needed.

And just like that, your long-form video is ready to upload. The kind that used to take a team a full week now happens in one sitting.

#vidrush #aiyoutube #aivideos #aiautomation #youtubeautomation
items.transcript: You can now build entire YouTube channels using this one AI tool called VidRush. It's the world's first AI that can turn your simple text prompts into full one-hour-long documentary videos entirely on its own. You just give it a video idea, and it'll research and write a complete script for you. Then, it scans the entire internet to find real-world footage that matches your story. And if it can't find the right clip, it'll automatically generate custom motion graphics to fill that gap. From there, it adds voiceovers, texts, transitions, and sound effects. And finally, it'll load everything into an editing timeline where you can adjust any part of the video just by chatting with it. And just like that, your long-form video is ready to upload. So, want to give it a try? Just comment "video" and I'll send you the link directly.

items.caption:
Comment "CLAUDE" to get this Massive AI Skills Library for Claude, Codex and other AI Tools. 

If you're using Claude Code but not using Skills, you're basically missing out on 90% of its power.

Skills are like superpowers for your AI. Instead of writing the same long prompts over and over, you install a skill once and your AI becomes an expert at that task forever.

Think of it like hiring a specialist instead of training a generalist every single time. Massive time saver.

And just now, a huge new library called skills.sh by Vercel just dropped. 

It has over 100,000 pre-made Claude skills you can install and use instantly, completely free.

These skills turn Claude into a specialist for whatever task you have. 

UI design, app testing, SEO research, lead generation, content writing, and a lot more.

Each one comes with proven instructions baked in. So you skip the trial-and-error phase entirely.

The best part? You can also run them inside OpenClaw, Antigravity, Codex, and basically every AI code editor out there. 

Not just Claude Code.

That means one skill works across your entire toolkit. No re-learning, no rewriting, no platform lock-in.

Setup takes about 30 seconds. You just select the skill you want, copy its command, paste it in your terminal, and choose your AI agent.

Your new skill is ready to use immediately. No restart, no config files, no API setup.

For agency owners, indie devs, and anyone building with AI agents, this changes the whole workflow.

#claudeskills #claudecode #claudeai #skillssh #aiskills

items.caption:
Comment "MCP" try out Higgsfield MCP inside of Claude AI. 

You can now generate AI videos and images directly inside Claude. 

Higgsfield just launched their MCP, and it changes how creators work with generative tools.

No more jumping between tabs. No more stitching workflows across five platforms. 

Everything happens in one place.

You stay in the conversation, describe what you want, and Claude handles the rest.

The integration gives you access to 30+ top AI models inside any Claude chat. Soul, Cinema Studio, Seedance, Kling, Veo. All of them, just from a prompt.

No dropdowns. No memorizing which model does what. 

You describe the output and Claude picks the right engine for the job.

The range is wide. You can generate an image up to 4K for thumbnails, posters, or ad creatives. 

Spin up a 15-second video for a hook or product demo.

Or build a UGC-style ad and keep a custom character consistent across every scene. 

That last part is what most creators struggle with.

Think of it like a film crew that remembers your lead actor between shots. 

Character consistency has been the missing piece in AI video for over a year.

Setup is almost nothing. No API keys, no scripts, no developer dashboard. 

You just add Higgsfield as a connector in Claude's settings and your existing credits carry over.

The result? An entire production pipeline shrinks into a single chat window.

For agency owners, solo creators, and marketing teams running content at volume, the gap between idea and final asset just got a lot smaller.

#higgsfieldai #claudeai #modelcontextprotocol #aivideos #aiimages

items.caption:
Comment "WEBSITE" to get these Stunning Website prompts from MotionSites.Ai.

First, head to this website called motionsites.ai. It's packed with ready-to-use prompts for high-quality animated hero sections.

You'll find prompts for SaaS sites, portfolios, and agency websites. Each one gives you a solid foundation to start from.

Just pick the one you like and copy its prompt. No login, no signup, no friction.

Then open up Claude Code in your terminal. Paste in the prompt and describe the site you actually want to build.

Claude Code will instantly generate a fully animated website. Sleek UI, clean layouts, and smooth scroll animations across every section.

Think of it like ordering a fully furnished apartment instead of buying lumber. 

You skip the hard part and start with something that already looks good.

From there, you can refine the design to match your brand. Tweak the colors, swap the fonts, adjust the spacing.

Then build out the rest of your pages. About, pricing, contact, whatever your project needs.

Claude Code handles the heavy lifting on each one. You just direct the vision.

Once everything looks clean, deploy it with Vercel or Netlify. 

Both are free for personal projects and take about 2 minutes to set up.

Your site goes live with a real URL. No server setup, no DevOps headaches.

#motionsitesai #claudeai #claudecode #3dwebsite #websitedesigning

items.caption:
Comment "CLAUDE" to get the Guide and GitHub repo for running Claude Code for Free. 

You can now run Claude Code completely free, forever.

Someone on GitHub just dropped a tool called Free Claude Code Repo. 

It reroutes Claude Code to free AI models that hit around 90 percent of Claude's quality, at zero cost.

Think of it like swapping the engine in a sports car. Same dashboard, same controls, way cheaper fuel.

Over 20,000 devs are already running it. The setup takes 5 minutes, maybe less if you type fast.

First, head to the GitHub repo. Run the two install commands and your free Claude Code terminal is ready to go.

Then pick your provider. You can grab a free API key from NVIDIA NIM or OpenRouter. 

That gets you instant access to top models like DeepSeek, Kimi, and GLM.

The free tiers are generous. You can code for hours without hitting limits on most days.

Or if you have a decent GPU sitting around, run everything locally through Ollama. 

Full privacy, no API calls, no data leaving your machine.

The best part? You keep the exact same Claude Code workflow you already know. 

Same commands, same agent behavior, same terminal experience.

No new tool to learn. No new shortcuts to memorize.

This works for solo devs, indie hackers, and anyone tired of paying premium prices for AI coding. 

Students on tight budgets love it too.

#claudecode #claudeai #Openrouter #nvidianim #ollama

items.caption:
Comment "LEADS" to get this LinkedIn Scrapper for Qualified Lead Generation called Vayne AI. 

This AI tool pulls thousands of qualified leads from LinkedIn. You sleep. It works.

It's called Vayne. It scrapes LinkedIn Sales Navigator from the cloud.

No Chrome extension needed. It has the lowest fingerprint on LinkedIn. Any scraper? Yours stays safe.

You run a search in Sales Navigator. Vayne pulls the data. You get a clean spreadsheet.

What’s in it? Names. Job titles. Company info. Websites. Employee counts.

It removes emojis from names. Automatically. It fixes capitalization.

It strips out duplicates. Your list? Ready to use right away.

Most scrapers limit you. Two thousand five hundred profiles per search. That’s it.

Vayne splits larger queries. Automatically. It pulls up to fifteen thousand profiles a day.

Some features work without a LinkedIn account. At all.

Here’s how it helps. Like a robot farmer harvesting crops overnight.

You plant the search. It gathers the leads. Clean and sorted.

You search for sales managers in tech firms. Vayne grabs them. Thousands. No mess.

The good news? Your account risks nothing. Low fingerprint means safety.

It cleans data fast. Emojis gone. Caps fixed. Duplicates out.

Think of it this way. Most tools stop at twenty-five hundred. Like a small bucket. Vayne uses big ones. Splits the load. Fills them full.

No login for extras. Bulk pulls. Custom filters.

Leads come ready. Spreadsheets shine. Outreach starts now.

Vayne runs quiet. In the cloud. Day or night.

Pull leads. Build lists. Sell more. Simple as that.

#datascraping #linkedinscraper #salesnavigator #VayneAai #linkedinleads
items.transcript: This AI tool pulls thousands of qualified leads from LinkedIn while you sleep. It's called Vane, and it scrapes LinkedIn Sales Navigator entirely from the cloud. No Chrome extension, and they have the lowest fingerprint on LinkedIn of any scraper on the market, so your account stays safe. You run a search in Sales Navigator, Vane pulls the data, and you guys get a clean spreadsheet with names, job titles, company info, websites, and even employee counts. It'll automatically remove emojis from names, it'll fix capitalizations, and it'll strip out any duplicates so your guys' list is ready to use the second that it exports. Most scrapers cap you at 2,500 profiles per search, but Vane will automatically split larger queries and pull up to 15,000 profiles a day. Some features don't even require a LinkedIn account at all. So if you want to try it for yourself, just comment leads, and I'll send you the link directly.

items.caption:
Comment "CLAUDE" to get the Top 10 Claude Code Tips and Tricks from the creator Boris Cherny himself. 

Boris Cherny created Claude Code. He just shared 10 tips on how he uses it. Here are the key takeaways.

First, always start with Plan Mode. Do this before any code.

Just press Shift+Tab to turn it on. Iterate on your plan. Make it perfect. This stops many errors later. Think of it like drawing a map first.

Second, run multiple Claude Code sessions. Use each for a different project part. Then merge them at the end.

Let AI do the merge. You finish projects three to five times faster. It's like having extra hands working at once.

Third, the agent makes a mistake? Tell it to update its own claude.md file.

Do this every time. It learns. The same mistake won't happen again. Simple as fixing a recipe note.

Fourth, build sub-agents. Use them to automate your work.

One agent writes code. Another reviews it. A third deploys it. They all run on their own. Picture a team passing a baton smoothly.

The good news? These tips fit any workflow.

Because anytime Claude helps with one part, it speeds up the rest:

 1. Plan Mode keeps things clear.
 2. Parallel sessions save hours.
 3. Self-updates build smarts.
 4. Sub-agents handle repeats.

I recorded a full video guide. It breaks down all 10 tips. Watch it. Add them to your work.

#borischerny #claudeai #claudecode #claudetips #aitipsandtricks
items.transcript: The creator of ClaudeCode, Boris Cherny, just dropped 10 tips on how he personally uses ClaudeCode, and here are all the key takeaways. First, always start with plan mode before touching any code. You just press shift plus tab to activate it, then just iterate on the plan until it's perfect. This prevents a lot of errors and issues later on down the line. Second, run multiple ClaudeCode sessions in parallel, each working on a different part of your project, and then merge them at the end with AI. This alone can help you finish your project three to five times faster using Git work trees or agent teams. Third, every time the agent makes a mistake, just tell it to update its own Claude.md so it never happens again. And fourth, build and use sub-agents to automate parts of your workflow. For instance, have one agent write the code, another review the code, and another to deploy that code, all running automatically. I recorded a full video guide that breaks down all the 10 tips and how you can add them to your own workflow, so if you guys want the link, just comment Claude and I'll DM it to you directly.

items.caption:
Comment “PROMPT” to get this Design Master Prompt that instantly level-up your AI-Generated website design. 

Most AI-generated websites look the same. Why? AI has one big problem. The Purple Problem.

Picture this. Every AI website builder picks the same stuff. Tired purple gradients. 

Boring sans-serif fonts. Generic templates from one shared pile. Your SaaS dashboard? It looks just like the next guy's e-commerce site. 

Or that client portal down the street. All blend together. Like clones at a party. No one stands out.

The good news? This Design Prompt fixes it. Use it for every new project. I recently asked Base44 to build my inventory tracker. Dropped in the prompt. Boom. Custom look. No purple in sight.

Now Base44. It's great for raw ideas. Turn them into real apps. Websites too. Simple text prompts do it. Say, "Build a client dashboard." Add real-time analytics. Stripe payments. Supabase auth. 

It makes UIs. Backends. Databases. User logins. Booking systems. Inventory trackers. No code needed.

Add the prompt. It tells AI the way. Sleek fonts. Balanced layouts. Smooth micro-animations. Like hiring a designer. But free. And fast.

I tried it last week. Built a booking app for a client. Looked pro. Loaded quick. Felt right.

So try it. Go to Base44. Drop the prompt. Watch ideas come alive. Ditch the Purple Problem. Today.

#base44 #aicoding #vibecoding #aidesigntools #aiprompting
